use_cases: Primary navigation header for SaaS product websites
Landing pages with multiple sections like features, pricing, and about
Documentation sites with resource dropdown menus
Developer tools and API product pages
ai_summary: A responsive navigation header component for SaaS and developer tools websites. Features a clean navigation bar with main links, a dropdown resources menu with icons (Docs, Templates, Community, Changelog), dark mode toggle, and mobile hamburger menu. Built with Next.js and optimized for product landing pages requiring multiple content sections.
